title: pedilonum retroflexum
intro: Pedilonum retroflexum, also known as the Indian snakeroot, is a type of plant that belongs to the Pedilanthus genus. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pedilonum retroflexum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Pedilonum retroflexum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
